name: GOLFTEC Mequon
about: GOLFTEC Mequon is a high-tech golf training center specializing in data-driven instruction, club fitting, and practice. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, their expert coaches provide personalized feedback to help golfers of all levels improve their swing. The center offers a variety of services including private lessons, on-course coaching, practice memberships, and custom club fittings with equipment from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING. GOLFTEC operates on a membership or package-based pricing model, focusing on structured improvement plans rather than casual, pay-as-you-play sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and high-speed video analysis
Personalized game plans and structured improvement strategies
Custom club fitting to optimize performance and gain distance
Access to training bays with advanced technology for self-directed practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor, mentioned as hardware for fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent/borrow clubs from GOLFTEC for your lesson or practice session. Their club fitting services will provide custom-fit clubs if you choose to purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services being available, so bringing your own may not be applicable. It is best to check with the location directly for their specific policies.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Time for an 18-hole simulator session is not specified, but standard golf simulator rounds typically take between 1 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly, offering junior programs and lessons designed for young golfers to improve their skills in a supportive, high-tech environment.
